race.comment: BRAVE STAR (1) hasn't won for a long time but is ticking along nicely and relishes the heavy going. Doesn't need to improve much off his recent efforts to break the drought. MAXILDO (9) has returned in good order this campaign is likely to push forward again under the light weight of the 2kg claim to give himself every chance. Peak fitness now and is expected to play a role. HEAD OF THE HERD (6) hasn't done much wrong this prep and is drawn to land cosy from the inside if Murtagh can have him switched on early. No shock to see him right there. LOMAX (2) has rediscovered career-best form this prep and finds another suitable race. Will drift back from the draw and be hunting them down late. DIGARI (12) chased gamely into a close second when resuming at Bendigo in what has proven a strong form reference. Will need some luck from the carpark draw but gets in at flyweight with the 3kg claim. Not overlooking.
